Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Vorsran.
  2. Defeat 5 Nexar Stealth Bomber lvl 80.

Quest Text

Description

Upon entering Vorsran we have discovered an alien spacecraft equipped with cloaking technology and a type of nuke, we call it the Nexar Bomb. To secure our presence here we need to keep those things off the base or they will blow us apart and possibly even break our safe zone shield.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.
